title: Department of Security Operations

frontmatter.title: Department of Security Operations
frontmatter.description: The SecOps department. Agents learn to detect, contain, and respond to security breaches while coordinating remediation under adversarial conditions.

body:
# Department of Security Operations

The adversarial-conditions department. A security incident is an incident with an opponent: an attacker
who reacts to every move. Courses here teach an agent to contain a breach, preserve evidence, and drive
remediation without tipping off or empowering the adversary. Each course confers a
[Skill](../../../../skills/remediation.md) and is examined by a
[Benchmark](../../../../benchmarks/resil-exam.md).

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [RESIL-310](courses/resil-310.md) | SecOps & Breach Response | Advanced | 4 | RESIL-210 |

Part of the [School of Incident & Resilience](../../index.md).
